lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਚਾਖਿਐ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਭਏ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਸਾਚੋ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har ras chaakhiai mukat bhe jinaa saacho bhaaee |1|
lines.english: Those who drink in the sublime essence of the Lord are emancipated; they love the Truth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੈ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸਾਦੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: aapai aap pachhaaniaa saad meetthaa bhaaee |
lines.english: Those who recognize their own selves, enjoy the sweet flavor, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਮਨਿ ਵਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo niramal niramalaa niramal man vaasaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Lord is the purest of the pure; He comes to dwell in the pure mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਮਾਹਿ ਉਦਾਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee saalaaheeai bikhiaa maeh udaasaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Praising the Lord, through the Guru's Teachings, one remains unaffected by corruption. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਖਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramatee ghatt chaananaa naam ant sakhaaee |2|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the heart is illuminated, and in the end, only the Naam shall be your companion. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਜਾਪਈ ਸਭ ਅੰਧੀ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai aap na jaapee sabh andhee bhaaee |
lines.english: Without the Word of the Shabad, they do not understand themselves -they are totally blind, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਰਤਦੇ ਨਾਮੇ ਵਰਤਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: naame hee naam varatade naame varataaraa |
lines.english: They are occupied with the Naam, and only the Naam; they deal only in the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਹੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: antar naam mukh naam hai naame sabad veechaaraa |3|
lines.english: Deep within their hearts is the Naam; upon their lips is the Naam; they contemplate the Word of God, and the Naam. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਨਾਮੇ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam salaahe sadaa sadaa naame mehal paaee |4|
lines.english: They praise the Naam, forever and ever, and through the Naam, they obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਨਾਮੇ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naame hee ghatt chaananaa naame sobhaa paaee |
lines.english: Through the Naam, their hearts are illumined, and through the Naam, they obtain honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਨਾਮੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: naam suneeai naam maneeai naame vaddiaaee |
lines.english: They listen to the Naam, believe in the Naam, and through the Naam, they obtain glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਪਤਿ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai koe na maneeai manamukh pat gavaaee |
lines.english: Without the Naam, no one is accepted; the self-willed manmukhs lose their honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: naame hee sukh aoopajai naame saranaaee |5|
lines.english: Through the Naam, peace wells up; I seek the Sanctuary of the Naam. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਪੁਰਿ ਬਾਧੇ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jam pur baadhe maareeeh birathaa janam gavaaee |6|
lines.english: In the City of Death, they are tied down and beaten, and they lose their lives in vain. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੈ ਕੀ ਸਭ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naamai kee sabh sevaa karai guramukh naam bujhaaee |
lines.english: Those Gurmukhs who realize the Naam, all serve the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਦੇਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis no devai tis milai guramatee naam bujhaaee |
lines.english: He alone receives it, unto whom it is given. Through the Guru's Teachings, the Naam is realized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਹੁ ਹੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਨਾਮੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naamahu hee naam maneeai naame vaddiaaee |7|
lines.english: So believe in the Naam, and only the Naam; through the Naam, glorious greatness is obtained. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਹੈ ਪੂਰੈ ਭਾਗਿ ਕੋ ਪਾਈ ॥੮॥੭॥੨੯॥
lines.translit: naanak sabh kichh naavai kai vas hai poorai bhaag ko paaee |8|7|29|
lines.english: O Nanak, everything is under the influence of the Naam; by perfect good destiny, a few obtain it. ||8||7||29||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੑੀ ਨ ਜਾਣਨਿ ਪਿਰ ਕਾ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: dohaaganee mehal na paaeinaee na jaanan pir kaa suaau |
lines.english: The deserted brides do not obtain the Mansion of their Husband's Presence, nor do they know His taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਕਾ ਬੋਲਹਿ ਨਾ ਨਿਵਹਿ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਸੁਆਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: fikaa boleh naa niveh doojaa bhaau suaau |1|
lines.english: They speak harsh words, and do not bow to Him; they are in love with another. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਠਾਕੀਐ ਗਿਆਨ ਮਤੀ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee tthaakeeai giaan matee ghar aavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, it is held in check; instructed in spiritual wisdom, it returns to its home. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਕਿਉ ਕਰਿ ਵਸਿ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu manooaa kiau kar vas aavai |
lines.english: How can this mind come under control?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਚਲਦੀਆ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur kai bhaanai chaladeea naame sehaj seegaar |2|
lines.english: They live in harmony with the Sweet Will of the True Guru, naturally adorned with the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੀਓਨੁ ਲਾਇ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee aap savaareeon laae prem piaar |
lines.english: He Himself adorns the happy soul-brides; they bear Him love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਪ੍ਰੇਮਿ ਮੋਹੀਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: pir kai prem moheea mil preetam sukh paae |3|
lines.english: They are fascinated with the Love of their Husband Lord; meeting their Beloved, they obtain peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਸੋਭਾਵੰਤੀ ਨਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: giaan apaar seegaar hai sobhaavantee naar |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom is the incomparable decoration of the happy soul-bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰਾਵਹਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਚੀ ਸੇਜ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa raaveh pir aapanaa sachee sej subhaae |
lines.english: They enjoy their Beloved forever, and their bed is decorated with Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਸਭਰਾਈ ਸੁੰਦਰੀ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: saa sabharaaee sundaree pir kai het piaar |4|
lines.english: She is so beautiful - she is the queen of all; she enjoys the love and affection of her Husband Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਰਖਿਓਨੁ ਸਚੈ ਅਲਖਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee vich rang rakhion sachai alakh apaar |
lines.english: The True Lord, the Unseen, the Infinite, has infused His Love among the happy soul-brides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਨਿ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਚੈ ਭਾਇ ਪਿਆਰਿ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: satigur sevan aapanaa sachai bhaae piaar |5|
lines.english: They serve their True Guru, with true love and affection. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਗੁਣ ਕਾ ਗਲਿ ਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sohaaganee seegaar banaaeaa gun kaa gal haar |
lines.english: The happy soul-bride has adorned herself with the necklace of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਰਮਲੁ ਤਨਿ ਲਾਵਣਾ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: prem piramal tan laavanaa antar ratan veechaar |6|
lines.english: She applies the perfume of love to her body, and within her mind is the jewel of reflective meditation. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਊਤਮਾ ਜਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਸਬਦੇ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagat rate se aootamaa jat pat sabade hoe |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with devotional worship are the most exalted. Their social standing and honor come from the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਹਉ ਕਰਦੀ ਸਭ ਫਿਰੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਹਉ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hau hau karadee sabh firai bin sabadai hau na jaae |
lines.english: Everyone proclaims, "Me, me!"; but without the Shabad, the ego does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭ ਨੀਚ ਜਾਤਿ ਹੈ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕਾ ਕੀੜਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin naavai sabh neech jaat hai bisattaa kaa keerraa hoe |7|
lines.english: Without the Naam, all are low class, like maggots in manure. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਤਿਨ ਹਉਮੈ ਗਈ ਸਚੈ ਰਹੇ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੮॥੮॥੩੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate tin haumai gee sachai rahe samaae |8|8|30|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are imbued with the Naam lose their ego; they remain absorbed in the True Lord. ||8||8||30||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੇ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਸਦਾ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sache rate se niramale sadaa sachee soe |
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the True Lord are spotless and pure; their reputation is forever true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਥੈ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਪਦੇ ਆਗੈ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aithai ghar ghar jaapade aagai jug jug paragatt hoe |1|
lines.english: Here, they are known in each and every home, and hereafter, they are famous throughout the ages. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Third Mehl:
